public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as operations steward.
manner: Speaks bluntly about systems because the cost of polite delay is usually paid elsewhere. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a operations steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of operations steward in and around Civic Harmony Hall, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Civic Harmony Hall workable through the obligations of operations steward while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the underlying system working while everyone notices it only when stress, wear, or neglect begin to show. Around Civic Harmony Hall, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of operations steward visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Jalen March needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Civic Harmony Hall.
Working with Jalen March can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around Civic Harmony Hall.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Jalen March visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Civic Harmony Hall: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
